source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Clear English product UI with Japanese typography guidance for field safety dashboards, incident forms, status tables, search commands, and dense operational labels.
layout: Dense field-safety dashboards, compact navigation, 8px radii, serrated leaf-edge dividers, pale hair-line textures, deep green actions, woodland neutral surfaces, and practical warning states.

prompts.label: Transparent Nettle motif
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Nettle transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only nettle leaves for a Morphous design-system catalog, isolated as a single complete botanical subject on a removable chroma-key background.
Subject: A realistic cluster of stinging nettle leaves from a woodland edge: deep green serrated ovate leaves, sharply toothed margins, visible veins, pale translucent stinging hairs along stems and leaf edges, practical botanical clarity, natural asymmetry, crisp subject edges.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; include multiple overlapping nettle leaves, short green stems, and pale hair detail without cropping. Clean studio lighting, no cast shadow.
Chroma-key background: perfectly flat solid #ff00ff background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no flowers, no berries, no hands, no gloves, no signage, no landscape, no soil, no props, no second plant species, no text, no watermark, no decorative background.

prompts.label: Light-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: 16:9 high-resolution light-mode design-system board for Morphous catalog
Input images: the visible nettle motif cutout is the source reference for colors, texture, serrated-edge rhythm, pale stinging hair detail, and practical safety identity.
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode shadcn/tweakcn-like design-system board titled "Morphous Nettle".
Canvas: 3840 x 2160, 16:9, crisp readable UI labels and token names, no tiny text.
Required visible sections: palette, type, Japanese typography, components, navigation, dashboard/data, forms, tables, command/search, status, tokens, texture, radius, spacing, shadows.
System mood: practical safety system for woodland-edge field operations, dense but calm, scan-friendly, protective, precise, 8px radii throughout.
Color palette: derive only from the reference motif: deep nettle leaf green, darker serrated-edge green, young stem green, pale translucent stinging hair, woodland-edge bark and soil neutrals, cool mist surface, practical warning accent from nettle sting warmth. Avoid unrelated saturated colors, generic purple or blue gradients, beige-dominant styling, and stock UI-kit colors.
Layout: polished design board, left palette/token rail, central component and form examples, right dashboard/table/search/status modules, bottom row for texture, radius, spacing, shadow samples. Include a small motif cutout preview.
Typography: clear English UI type plus Japanese typography section with headings, body, captions, numerals, and examples such as "ネトル", "安全記録", "状態", "検索".
Components: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alert, card, table rows, command/search palette, compact sidebar navigation, metric cards, chart lines/bars, loading/empty/error/success states.
Texture/materials: subtle serrated leaf-edge dividers, pale hair-line texture, veined leaf panels, woodland-edge neutral surfaces, precise safety-strip accents.
Constraints: every visible UI element uses 8px radius or less; labels must fit inside containers; professional product design board; no marketing hero, no abstract gradients, no colors beyond motif-derived palette, no watermark.

prompts.label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: 16:9 high-resolution dark-mode design-system board for Morphous catalog
Input images: the visible nettle motif cutout and the visible Morphous Nettle light board are source references for colors, texture, layout coverage, and practical safety identity.
Primary request: Generate one separate dark-mode shadcn/tweakcn-like design-system board titled "Morphous Nettle". It must feel like the same practical safety system translated to dark mode, not a new theme.
Canvas: 3840 x 2160, 16:9, crisp readable UI labels and token names, no tiny text.
Required visible sections: dark palette, type, Japanese typography, components, navigation, dashboard/data, forms, tables, command/search, status, tokens, texture, radius, spacing, shadows.
System mood: night-mode field safety operations, woodland-edge monitoring, dense but calm, scan-friendly, protective, precise, 8px radii throughout.
Color palette: derive only from the reference motif: deepest nettle leaf green and shadow green backgrounds, pale hair foreground, young stem green controls, mossy edge greens, woodland bark and soil neutrals, muted practical warning accent for sting risk. Avoid neon colors, unrelated saturated colors, generic purple or blue gradients, pure-black-only flat backgrounds, and stock UI-kit colors.
Layout: polished dark design board, left palette/token rail, central component and form examples, right dashboard/table/search/status modules, bottom row for texture, radius, spacing, shadow samples. Include a small motif cutout preview.
Typography: clear English UI type plus Japanese typography section with headings, body, captions, numerals, and examples such as "ネトル", "安全記録", "状態", "検索".
Components: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alert, card, table rows, command/search palette, compact sidebar navigation, metric cards, chart lines/bars, loading/empty/error/success states.
Texture/materials: subtle dark serrated leaf-edge dividers, pale hair-line texture, veined leaf panels, woodland-edge neutral panels, precise safety-strip accents.
Constraints: every visible UI element uses 8px radius or less; labels must fit inside containers; professional product design board; no marketing hero, no abstract gradients, no colors beyond motif-derived palette, no watermark, no misspelling of "Morphous Nettle".
